pages.name: The Brute
pages.text: The Brute has an enormous reserve of health and does not give ground easily. It follows targets from long range, hits hard, and tears through blocks at an alarming speed. Never assume a thin wall will buy enough time.

pages.title: Rock Attack
pages.text: When a target is outside melee range, the Brute can throw rocks. Watch for the windup, then break line of sight or move well clear of the impact point. The blast can hurt anyone standing too close to it.

pages.title: Counterplay
pages.text: Do not bunch up. Break line of sight during the windup, keep solid cover between the impact point and the group, and avoid fighting with a wall or drop behind you.$(br2)Use the warning period to reload and clear a lateral escape route.

pages.title: Encrypted Intel
pages.text: Rumours have it, these ex-military personel were sent here to recover valuable Encrypted Intel. This is the sort of field information the survivor network values most; transmit it to open access to better equipment and support.
